headline: Is The Clorox Company (CLX) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is CLX a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on The Clorox Company on DividendInvestor’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CLX. The Clorox Company’s share was trading at $96.66 as of April 27th. CLX’s trailing and forward P/E were 15.82 and 14.01 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]

headline: CLX Q1 Deep Dive: Margin Gains Offset by Cautious Outlook and Guidance Reduction
summary: Consumer products giant Clorox (NYSE:CLX) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales were flat year on year at $1.67 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.64 per share was 6.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Why Clorox (CLX) Shares Are Getting Obliterated Today
summary: Shares of consumer products giant Clorox (NYSE:CLX) fell 9.1% in the morning session after the company reported mixed first-quarter results and lowered its full-year profit forecast.
